queries.question: Show me every film, the genre, release year and who the director was.
queries.sql:
SELECT 
Movie.title,
Movie.genre,
Movie.release_year,
Director.name
FROM Movie
JOIN Director ON Director.id = Movie.director_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?genre ?release_year ?name WHERE {
  ?movie a :Movies .
  ?director a :Directors .
  ?movie p:hasDirector ?director .
  ?movie p:title ?title .
  ?movie p:genre ?genre .
  ?movie p:release_year ?release_year .
  ?director p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: List all the films, genres, release years and the film creators who made them.
queries.sql:
SELECT 
Movie.title,
Movie.genre,
Movie.release_year,
Studio.name
FROM Movie
JOIN Studio ON Studio.id = Movie.studio_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?genre ?release_year ?name WHERE {
  ?movie a :Movies .
  ?studio a :Studio .
  ?movie p:hasStudio ?studio .
  ?movie p:title ?title .
  ?movie p:genre ?genre .
  ?movie p:release_year ?release_year .
  ?studio p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: List all the films, genres, release years and the film creators who made them.
queries.sql:
SELECT 
Movie.title,
Movie.genre,
Movie.release_year,
Studio.name, Director.name
FROM Movie
JOIN Studio ON Studio.id = Movie.studio_id JOIN Director ON Director.id = Movie.director_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?genre ?release_year ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?movie a :Movies .
  ?studio a :Studio .
  ?movie p:hasStudio ?studio .
  ?director a :Directors .
  ?movie p:hasDirector ?director .
  ?movie p:title ?title .
  ?movie p:genre ?genre .
  ?movie p:release_year ?release_year .
  ?studio p:name ?name .
  ?director p:name ?name2 .
}

queries.question: List all the movie titles, their studios, directors, lead actors and the roles each actor played.
queries.sql:
SELECT 
Movie.title,
Actor.name,
Role.character,
Studio.name, Director.name
FROM Movie
JOIN Role ON Role.Movie_ID = Movie.id
JOIN Actor ON Actor.id = Role.actor_id
JOIN Studio ON Studio.id = Movie.studio_id JOIN Director ON Director.id = Movie.director_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?name ?character ?name2 ?name3 WHERE {
  ?movie a :Movies .
  ?role a :Role .
  ?role p:hasMovie ?movie .
  ?actor a :Actors .
  ?role p:hasActor ?actor .
  ?studio a :Studio .
  ?movie p:hasStudio ?studio .
  ?director a :Directors .
  ?movie p:hasDirector ?director .
  ?movie p:title ?title .
  ?actor p:name ?name .
  ?role p:character ?character .
  ?studio p:name ?name2 .
  ?director p:name ?name3 .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List all the films, genres, release years and the film creators who made them.
List all the movies, their creators, the lead actors and the roles that they played.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  full: { SELECT ?title ?name ?character ?name2 ?name3 WHERE {
  ?movie a :Movies .
  ?role a :Role .
  ?role p:hasMovie ?movie .
  ?actor a :Actors .
  ?role p:hasActor ?actor .
  ?studio a :Studio .
  ?movie p:hasStudio ?studio .
  ?director a :Directors .
  ?movie p:hasDirector ?director .
  ?movie p:title ?title .
  ?actor p:name ?name .
  ?role p:character ?character .
  ?studio p:name ?name2 .
  ?director p:name ?name3 .
} }
  component: { SELECT ?title ?name ?character ?name2 WHERE {
  ?movie a :Movies .
  ?role a :Role .
  ?role p:hasMovie ?movie .
  ?actor a :Actors .
  ?role p:hasActor ?actor .
  ?studio a :Studio .
  ?movie p:hasStudio ?studio .
  ?movie p:title ?title .
  ?actor p:name ?name .
  ?role p:character ?character .
  ?studio p:name ?name2 .
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?title ?name ?character ?name2 WHERE {
  ?movie a :Movies .
  ?role a :Role .
  ?role p:hasMovie ?movie .
  ?actor a :Actors .
  ?role p:hasActor ?actor .
  ?director a :Directors .
  ?movie p:hasDirector ?director .
  ?movie p:title ?title .
  ?actor p:name ?name .
  ?role p:character ?character .
  ?director p:name ?name2 .
} }
}
